data.description: Issuer 21Shares AG has published a UK Base Prospectus.

data.title: PuroClean Looks to Expand to the California Bay Area Amid Rising Demand for Services Due to Weather, Fires and Everyday Property Issues
data.description: PuroClean, a prominent property restoration and remediation franchise, is currently providing franchise and conversion prospects in Northern California. With headquarters in Tamarac, Fla., the company disclosed its intention to broaden its presence in this region on April 21, 2026. This move signifies an effort to penetrate the market further and capitalize on the growing demand for restoration services.

data.title: Transect Launches Data Center Pulse Product to Identify Community Opposition Risks
data.description: A new tool called Data Center Pulse has been introduced by Transect in San Antonio. This tool evaluates the probability of community approval for data center initiatives.

data.title: Neon One Appoints David O’Connor as Chief Financial Officer to Support Next Phase of Growth
data.description: Neon One, a nonprofit software platform focusing on fostering generosity in communities, has recently named David O’Connor as its Chief Financial Officer in Chicago. This strategic appointment aims to bolster the executive team amid the company's efforts to enhance its Nonprofit Relationship Management Platform in response to growing market demand. O’Connor brings over 20 years of financial leadership experience from various SaaS and growth-stage technology firms. His most recent position involved serving as C.

data.title: People.ai Becomes Backstory, Redefining How Revenue Teams Get Answers About Their Deals
data.description: In San Francisco, the prominent AI answers platform for sales teams, People.ai, revealed a significant change today as it transitions to the name Backstory. This rebrand represents the company's move from a focus on data and analytics to providing practical solutions to the inquiries that revenue leaders commonly have. Amid challenges faced by sales teams in accurately understanding their forecasts and pipelines, Backstory aims to assist in deciphering the true status of deals and their progress.

data.title: Virtuix Showcases Virtual Terrain Walk to Senior Defense Officials at Immersive Technology Summit in Orlando
data.description: Virtuix recently presented its Virtual Terrain Walk technology to senior defense officials at the Immersive Technology Summit held in Orlando. The immersive technology allows users to experience virtual environments by walking on an omnidirectional treadmill. The summit attracted over 200 attendees, including representatives from various defense organizations. The event provided an opportunity for Virtuix to demonstrate their cutting-edge technology and its potential applications in the defense sector.

data.title: Covera Health and Medmo Combine to Deliver the First Platform That Manages the Complete Radiology Journey: From Imaging Order to Accurate Diagnosis
data.description: A newly merged organization now caters to around 6 million individuals in the United States, including employees from Fortune 10 and 100 companies, as well as clients from three of the five largest national health plans and significant value-based primary care groups. In a recent development on April 21, 2026, Insight Partners pledged further financial support to facilitate the expansion of this combined entity.

data.title: Great Lakes Credit Union, Mortgage Forward and Takara Close First-Ever DREAM Transaction, Making History in U.S. Mortgage Market
data.description: In a historic event in the U.S., Great Lakes Credit Union (GLCU), along with CUSO Mortgage Forward and Takara, concluded the first-ever DREAM (Discount for Real Estate Affordability and Mobility) transaction. On April 11, 2026, Frank and Daniella McGovern from Chicago became the inaugural beneficiaries, receiving a live check exceeding $41,000. This amount represented a principal balance reduction as part of the closing process.

data.title: QVC's Annual Foodie Fest Returns for a Flavor-Packed Weekend of Must-Try Eats and Culinary Stars
data.description: A two-day event is set to take place showcasing Gemma Stafford's QVC debut, alongside an expansion of the TikTok Shop and a selection of top food brands. The event, known as the 4th Annual Foodie Fest, will be held in West Chester, Pa., beginning on April 21, 2026. QVC®, a prominent player in live social shopping, will be a major part of the event featuring various vendors and activities.

data.title: Red Hat Further Drives Digital Sovereignty for the AI Era with Red Hat OpenShift on Google Cloud Dedicated
data.description: Red Hat, a top open source solutions provider, unveiled plans to support Red Hat OpenShift on Google Cloud Dedicated, marking a significant step in their ongoing partnership. This collaboration aims to cater to highly regulated sectors like finance, healthcare, and public services by offering isolated infrastructure on Google Cloud. The move underscores Red Hat's commitment to providing operational autonomy for organizations needing to adhere to rigorous digital sovereignty regulations.

data.title: Rich, Creamy and Better Than Ever: A New Generation of I Can't Believe It's Not Butter!® Extra Creamy Products with Fresh Cream Deliver Rich Texture with Essential Nutrients
data.description: Extra Creamy is a versatile product that enhances the flavor of dishes, endorsed by Chef Gordon Ramsay. Located in Hackensack, New Jersey, the brand I Can't Believe It's Not Butter! has enhanced its NutriRich™ range. This introduction brings an elevated standard in the lineup, marking an improvement in its quality. The announcement was made on April 21, 2026, by the company via PRNewswire. The new product promises to bring a higher level of creaminess and flavor to every meal, aiming to revolutionize cooking experiences.

data.title: Intapp to announce fiscal third quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026
data.description: Intapp, Inc. (NASDAQ: INTA), based in Palo Alto, California, is a prominent governed AI platform provider for professional firms in regulated industries. The company is set to announce its fiscal third quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on May 5, 2026. A webcast will be hosted by management at 5 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the company's financial standing and business performance. Investors and individuals keen on this information can join the webcast.

data.title: Bluevine Study Reveals 3 in 4 Small Business Owners Say It's Worth It, But More Than Half Hit a Cash Flow Crisis First
data.description: A recent report from Bluevine has highlighted a notable disparity between expectations and reality among small business owners (SBOs). The report shows that 75% of SBOs believe that running their own business is worthwhile. However, 27% of owners have experienced burnout levels higher than initially anticipated. This survey, conducted by Bluevine, a prominent digital banking provider, sheds light on the challenges faced by business owners. The findings indicate that a significant portion of SBOs are grappling with unexpected levels of burnout despite their overall positive outlook on entrepreneurship.

data.title: Rectangle Health Reaffirms Robust Security Framework through PCI DSS Attestation of Compliance Renewal
data.description: Valhalla, NY - On April 21, 2026, Rectangle Health, a prominent provider of healthcare payment and technology solutions, revealed that an independent assessment by AoC has verified its robust capabilities in secure data handling, oversight, and compliance throughout the system. The assessment reassured stakeholders about the company's commitment to maintaining high standards in these crucial areas. This announcement highlights Rectangle Health's dedication to ensuring data security and regulatory compliance within the healthcare industry.

data.title: SiFly and ADS-B Exchange Debut First-of-Its-Kind Shared Airspace Awareness Across Crewed and Uncrewed Aircraft
data.description: SiFly Aviation and ADS-B Exchange have collaborated to introduce cloud-connected and long-endurance Q12 drones in ADS-B Exchange, enhancing shared airspace awareness. The partnership, announced on April 21, 2026, in Santa Clara, California, marks a significant development in airspace monitoring. The new model enables greater collaboration across crewed aircraft and drones, promoting safer skies.

data.title: Hanky Panky® + Saalt® Named 2026 Product of the Year Winner for Revolutionary Leakproof Lace Innovation
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in New York and Boise, Idaho, the hanky panky+ [powered by Saalt] Thong secured the 2026 Product of the Year USA Award in a nationwide survey. A total of 40,000 American shoppers participated in the study conducted by Kantar to select the winner.
